data.body: AC amendment: Add test_verification_command_or_token_instruction_present to the test file — this structural assertion checks that SKILL.md Phase 1.5 references both verification_command and a confirmation-token fallback for user_manual entries whose verification_command is omitted. Verify: grep -q 'verification_command\|confirmation.token' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md (covering DD2 completeness)
